content: Just as human language learners build implicit understanding of vocabulary like 'reflection' through repeated contextual use and conscious review, Reflexion’s dynamic memory for autonomous agents can be augmented by integrating Self-Refine’s iterative feedback loop to turn one-off reflective observations into incrementally improved action plans. This hierarchical framework creates a learning cycle that mirrors how human learners move from basic recognition of a concept to refined mastery through repeated self-feedback.
